Note: Honestly, I have no idea if the bot in question is a furry or demi-human, and I don't really care much to get the classification right, but if I'm wrong, just let me know below. The character's appearance is just killer. And I picked a French name for her. Why? Just because I felt like it. And I'm bummed about what happened to Erik421, F for him, I was pretty surprised by what went down with him. About his work, I was more of an admirer than a fan; I used a lot of his coding to base and improve my own bots.
